title: THESE 2 Things Will Make You Successful (Ryan Holiday's Advice For Gen Z)
summary: A brief discussion about success advice for young people, focusing on finding one's life purpose and finding mentors, based on concepts from the book 'Mastery'.

key_claims.claim: The first two sections in the book Mastery are about finding your life's task and finding a mentor who can teach you
If you get your life's task and mentor right, you can get a lot wrong afterward and still be really successful
